examples: On a rainy and blustery day it is not unusual to get soaking wet when wrestling with a troublesome brolly.

The team's last bid to reach a big tournament, overseen by a native known as “the wally with a brolly”, ended in humiliation.
He had a brolly in one hand and his bag in the other.
